title: California State AI Use Policy
summary: Statewide policy governing the responsible use of artificial intelligence and generative AI by California state agencies, aligned with EO N-12-23 and EO N-5-26.
content_preview: This policy establishes requirements for state agencies deploying AI systems, including risk assessments, bias audits, transparency reporting, and procurement standards for AI vendors.

title: State Data Governance Framework
summary: Framework for data governance across California state agencies, covering data classification, access controls, retention, and inter-agency sharing protocols.
content_preview: The framework defines data stewardship roles, metadata standards, and compliance requirements under CCPA/CPRA for state-held personal information.

title: Cross-Agency Collaboration Procedures
summary: Standard operating procedures for cross-agency collaboration, data sharing agreements, and joint project governance under the Envision 2026 strategy.
content_preview: Procedures include templates for memoranda of understanding, data sharing agreements, and escalation paths for inter-agency disputes.

title: CEQA Guidelines for State Agencies
summary: Updated CEQA guidelines providing state agencies with environmental review requirements for infrastructure and development projects.
content_preview: Includes streamlined review processes for housing and transportation projects under recent legislative updates, categorical exemptions, and infill development provisions.

title: California Climate Action Plan
summary: Statewide climate action plan outlining emissions reduction targets, adaptation strategies, and climate resilience measures for state agencies.
content_preview: The plan sets agency-level GHG reduction targets, sustainable procurement guidelines, and climate risk assessment requirements aligned with executive orders.

title: Benefits Administration Manual
summary: Comprehensive manual governing the administration of public benefits programs including CalFresh, CalWORKs, and General Assistance across California counties.
content_preview: Covers eligibility determination, benefit calculation, county reporting requirements, fraud detection procedures, and inter-county transfer protocols.

title: Medi-Cal Provider Handbook
summary: Handbook for Medi-Cal providers covering enrollment, billing, claims submission, and compliance requirements for healthcare service delivery.
content_preview: Includes provider enrollment procedures, fee schedule references, prior authorization requirements, and audit preparation guidelines for managed care and fee-for-service.

title: Unemployment Insurance Program Guide
summary: Program guide for unemployment insurance covering eligibility criteria, weekly certification, appeals process, and overpayment recovery procedures.
content_preview: Provides staff with decision-making guidance for complex UI claims including interstate claims, combined wage claims, and disaster unemployment assistance.

title: CalFresh Program Policy Manual
summary: Comprehensive policy guidelines for CalFresh program eligibility, application processing, and benefit issuance across California counties.
content_preview: Covers income limits, household composition rules, expedited service timelines, and quality control requirements for county CalFresh operations.

title: CalWORKs Welfare-to-Work Requirements
summary: Policy on welfare-to-work program participation requirements, exemptions, and sanctions for CalWORKs recipients.
content_preview: Details participation hour requirements, allowable activities, good cause exemptions, and progressive sanction procedures.

title: Data Sharing and Privacy Policy
summary: Policy governing data sharing between CDSS and other state agencies, including CCPA/CPRA compliance requirements.
content_preview: Establishes protocols for inter-agency data exchange, PII handling, consent requirements, and breach notification procedures.

title: Telework Policy for State Agencies
summary: Statewide regulations governing telework eligibility, schedules, and performance expectations for California state employees.
content_preview: Covers telework agreement templates, equipment provisions, cybersecurity requirements for remote work, and supervisor responsibilities.

title: Medi-Cal Managed Care Policy Guide
summary: Policy guide for Medi-Cal managed care plans, including enrollment, provider networks, and quality standards.
content_preview: Details managed care plan responsibilities, network adequacy standards, member grievance processes, and quality improvement requirements.

title: Medi-Cal Eligibility FAQ
summary: Frequently asked questions about Medi-Cal eligibility requirements, application process, and coverage details.
content_preview: Answers common questions about income limits, asset tests, continuous eligibility, and the application timeline.

title: Unemployment Insurance Claims Processing Procedures
summary: Detailed procedures for processing unemployment insurance claims, including initial filing, certification, and appeals.
content_preview: Covers claim intake workflows, identity verification, wage record lookups, and determination issuance timelines.
